Hero.body: Femto Isotope produces, supplies and labels the radioisotopes that power diagnosis and therapy worldwide — backed by reactor capacity, radiochemistry expertise, and a supply chain built to never miss a dose.

About.heading: Empowering healthcare through advanced isotope technology
About.body: We exist to put reliable radioisotopes in the hands of the people who heal with them. From reactor irradiation to release-ready product, Femto bridges nuclear science and clinical practice across healthcare, research and industry.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Harness radioisotopes to drive progress in medicine, research and industry — delivering quality our customers can build on.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: A future where nuclear medicine leads how disease is diagnosed and treated, worldwide and without interruption.

quality.title: Quality & safety
quality.body: Strict regulatory standards, advanced radiation monitoring and validated handling at every step.

supply.title: Reliable supply
supply.body: A resilient chain engineered to keep isotopes flowing — because a missed dose is never an option.

Capabilities.heading: Three ways we move your work forward

supply.title: Radioisotope supply
supply.body: A diverse catalogue of medical and industrial radioisotopes — quality-controlled for purity, activity and stability, then delivered on a schedule you can plan around.

labelling.title: Custom radiolabelling
labelling.body: Bespoke radiolabelling of compounds and tracers to your protocol — from precursor handling through to a characterised, release-ready product.

research.title: Contract research
research.body: Radiochemistry and nuclear-science expertise for academia, pharma and industry: radiotracer development, radiochemical analysis and radiopharmaceutical development.

Isotopes.heading: The isotopes behind modern diagnosis & therapy
Isotopes.body: Each one quality-controlled for the application it serves — from SPECT imaging to targeted oncology and industrial inspection.
Isotopes.reactorTitle: Neutron irradiation on our nuclear reactor
Isotopes.reactorBody: Custom production of medical and industrial isotopes — reliable, efficient and tailored to your activity, purity and timing requirements.

mo.name: Molybdenum-99
mo.use: Parent of Tc-99m — the workhorse generator behind everyday SPECT imaging. Steady, consistent supply for hospitals worldwide.

i.name: Iodine-131
i.use: Diagnosis and treatment of thyroid disease in one isotope, produced under rigorous quality control for the medical industry.

lu.name: Lutetium-177
lu.use: Targeted radioligand therapy in oncology — produced from enriched Yb-176 on our reactor for high purity and yield.

ir.name: Iridium-192
ir.use: High-quality sources for industrial radiography and non-destructive testing — accuracy and safety for demanding inspection work.

yb.name: Ytterbium-176
yb.use: Enriched target material irradiated in-house to produce Lu-177 — the starting point of our therapy supply line.

WhyFemto.heading: Built for the work that can't wait

quality.title: Quality & safety, without compromise
quality.body: State-of-the-art facilities with advanced radiation monitoring and validated protocols for handling, transport and disposal — fully aligned with applicable regulation.

supply.title: Reliable supply chain
supply.body: A resilient network engineered around the realities of half-life and logistics, so deliveries arrive when patients and projects need them.

technology.title: Advanced technology
technology.body: Reactor capacity and modern radiochemistry let us produce to spec across diagnostic and therapeutic isotopes.

experience.title: Proven experience
experience.body: A team with deep roots in nuclear medicine, trusted by hospitals, researchers and industry partners.

education.title: Education & support
education.body: Knowledge-sharing sits at the core of our mission — we back every supply with expertise you can lean on.

Applications.heading: From the scanner to the production floor

nuclearMedicine.title: Nuclear medicine
nuclearMedicine.body: The isotopes that make functional imaging and targeted therapy possible at the point of care.

molecularImaging.title: Molecular imaging
molecularImaging.body: PET and SPECT tracers that reveal biology in motion — long before anatomy alone would show it.

thyroid.title: Thyroid uptake & therapy
thyroid.body: I-131 for precise diagnosis and treatment of thyroid conditions, with dependable activity.

radiopharma.title: Radiopharmaceuticals
radiopharma.body: From generators to labelled compounds — the building blocks of modern radiopharmacy.

oncology.title: Oncology & therapy
oncology.body: Lu-177 radioligand therapy that brings the dose to the disease, sparing healthy tissue.

industrial.title: Industrial radiography
industrial.body: Ir-192 sources for non-destructive testing that keeps critical infrastructure safe.

demand.title: Global demand for nuclear-medicine isotopes keeps rising — and Femto is strengthening reliable supply
demand.body: As nuclear medicine grows worldwide, a secure and uninterrupted supply chain has become essential to reaching patients on time. We're investing where the vulnerabilities are greatest.

eanm.title: Femto Isotope at EANM 2024
eanm.body: We joined the European Association of Nuclear Medicine Congress, 19–23 October, to share our latest advances and connect with the community.

therapyLine.title: From Yb-176 to Lu-177: our therapy line explained
therapyLine.body: How enriched targets become high-purity Lutetium-177 for targeted oncology — and what that means for your radioligand programmes.

ContactCTA.heading: Secure your <grad>isotope supply.</grad>
ContactCTA.body: Whether you need radioisotope products, custom radiolabelling, or contract research support, we're ready to help you advance your projects. Tell us what you're working on.

AboutHero.heading: The people behind <grad>reliable isotope supply.</grad>
AboutHero.body: We bridge nuclear science and clinical practice — delivering medical and industrial radioisotopes that hospitals, researchers and industry partners can build on.

AboutStory.heading: From nuclear science to clinical practice
paragraphs: Femto Isotope exists to put reliable radioisotopes in the hands of the people who heal with them. From reactor irradiation to release-ready product, we bridge nuclear science and clinical practice across healthcare, research and industry.
Our roots reach back to a long lineage in radiochemistry — tracing to Cimex Misr — and decades of hands-on experience producing and handling radioactive sources to exacting standards.
Today that heritage powers a focused portfolio: PET & FDG kits, PET cancer kits and radiopharmaceutical generators, supported by contract research and custom radiolabelling for partners worldwide.

origins.title: A lineage in radiochemistry
origins.body: Our story traces back through Cimex Misr and a long tradition of producing and handling radioactive sources to exacting standards.

y2009.title: Roots take hold
y2009.body: The radiochemistry foundations Femto Isotope is built on are laid — the start of decades of hands-on experience with radioactive sources.

scaleup.title: In-house reactor capacity
scaleup.body: Reactor irradiation and modern radiochemistry come together, letting us produce therapeutic isotopes like Lu-177 from enriched Yb-176.

y2024.title: On the world stage
y2024.body: Femto Isotope joins the EANM Congress in Hamburg to share advances and connect with the nuclear-medicine community.

today.title: Berlin to New York
today.body: From our Berlin headquarters and New York office, we supply medical and industrial radioisotopes to partners worldwide.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.title: Harness radioisotopes to drive progress
mission.body: To advance medicine, research and industry by producing and delivering radioisotopes of a quality our customers can build on — reliably, safely and without interruption.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.title: Nuclear medicine at the heart of care
vision.body: A future where nuclear medicine leads how disease is diagnosed and treated worldwide — backed by patient-centred care, education and continuous improvement.

irradiation.title: Reactor irradiation
irradiation.body: Enriched targets — like Yb-176 — are irradiated in-house to create the isotopes at the heart of every product.

radiochemistry.title: Radiochemistry
radiochemistry.body: Separation and purification turn irradiated targets into high-purity isotopes, characterised down to the trace level.

qualityControl.title: Quality control
qualityControl.body: Activity, radiochemical purity and stability are checked against spec before anything is cleared for release.

delivery.title: Cold-chain delivery
delivery.body: Half-life-aware logistics move release-ready isotopes to hospitals and partners — on schedule, every time.

quality.title: Quality & safety first
quality.body: Strict regulatory standards, advanced radiation monitoring and validated protocols for handling, transport and disposal at every step.

supply.title: Reliable supply
supply.body: A resilient chain engineered around the realities of half-life and logistics, so deliveries arrive when patients and projects need them.

technology.title: Advanced technology
technology.body: Reactor capacity and modern radiochemistry let us produce to spec across diagnostic and therapeutic isotopes.

experience.title: Proven experience
experience.body: A team with deep roots in nuclear medicine, trusted by hospitals, researchers and industry partners.

education.title: Education & support
education.body: Knowledge-sharing sits at the core of our mission — we back every supply with expertise you can lean on.

ProductsHero.heading: Radioisotopes for <grad>diagnosis, therapy & industry.</grad>
ProductsHero.body: From reactor irradiation to release-ready product, we supply medical and industrial radioisotopes — each quality-controlled for the application it serves, from SPECT imaging to targeted oncology and non-destructive testing.

ProductsCatalogue.heading: The isotopes behind modern diagnosis & therapy
ProductsCatalogue.body: A diverse range of medical and industrial radioisotopes — quality-controlled for purity, activity and stability, then delivered on a schedule you can plan around.

mo.name: Molybdenum-99
mo.summary: Our Mo-99 is the parent of Tc-99m — the workhorse generator behind everyday SPECT imaging. We ensure a stable, consistent supply for healthcare facilities worldwide.

i.name: Iodine-131
i.summary: As a leading supplier of I-131, we deliver top-quality isotopes for the diagnosis and treatment of thyroid conditions — produced under rigorous quality control.

lu.name: Lutetium-177
lu.summary: Produced in-house from enriched Yb-176, our Lu-177 is an essential isotope for targeted radioligand therapy in oncology — delivered at high purity and yield.

ir.name: Iridium-192
ir.summary: We supply Ir-192, a versatile isotope widely used in industrial radiography for non-destructive testing — high-quality sources ensuring accuracy and safety.

yb.name: Ytterbium-176
yb.summary: Enriched Yb-176 target material is irradiated on our reactor to produce Lu-177 — the starting point of our targeted-therapy supply line.

ProductsServices.title: Neutron irradiation on our nuclear reactor
ProductsServices.body: Our cutting-edge nuclear reactor offers advanced irradiation services for the production of high-quality medical and industrial radioisotopes — tailored to your activity, purity and timing requirements for healthcare, research and industry.

ContactHero.heading: Let's build your <grad>isotope supply.</grad>
ContactHero.body: Whether you require radioisotope products, custom radiolabelling services, or contract research support, Femto Isotope is here to meet your needs — with a reply within one business day.

home.title: Femto Isotope — The Heart of Nuclear Medicine
home.description: Femto Isotope is a Berlin-based supplier of medical and industrial radioisotopes — Mo-99, I-131, Lu-177, Ir-192 — with contract radiochemistry and custom radiolabelling services.

about.title: About Us — Femto Isotope
about.description: Femto Isotope bridges nuclear science and clinical practice — a Berlin-based supplier of medical and industrial radioisotopes, with roots in radiochemistry and a focus on reliable, safe supply.

products.title: Products — Femto Isotope
products.description: Medical and industrial radioisotopes from Femto Isotope — Mo-99, I-131, Lu-177, Ir-192 and Yb-176 — plus neutron irradiation services on our nuclear reactor, all quality-controlled for the application they serve.

contact.title: Contact Us — Femto Isotope
contact.description: Get in touch with Femto Isotope — radioisotope supply, custom radiolabelling and contract research. Offices in Berlin and New York.
